cn.releaseNotes:
- Native Clock Swipe input method added for all.

# Introducing: Onyx Print
Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world.

# Produce Physical Photographs
Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending.

# Dynamic Prompting
Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx.
Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match.

# Use Your Own Photos
You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal.

# Works With Other Apps
Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it.
cn.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx: zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it sbeem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for revealing something ephemeral. Photograph a shadow, clouds, a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— Native clock swipe input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

# Introducing: Onyx Print
Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world.

# Produce Physical Photographs
Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending.

# Dynamic Prompting
Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx.
Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match.

# Use Your Own Photos
You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal.

# Works With Other Apps
Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it.

Onyx Print is an in-app purchase within Onyx, and currently supports the Instax mini Link+, with plans for additional printers in the future.

Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits.

Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

cn.description:
【核心特色：这就是你从未体验过的江湖】

1.  “移动端发货”：独属于你的无缝武侠大世界，真实武林画卷
       无读条世界：告别加载画面！我们打造了一个面积达256丈的无缝大世界——中原、江南、西域、南疆……从熙熙攘攘的古城街区，到人迹罕至的雪山秘境，所有场景皆可自由探索。
       活的江湖：昼夜、真实天气、万物动态（可破坏环境、可拾取万物）。世界不仅仅是背景，更是可交互的阶段。
       无束缚体验：轻功飞跃山河，踏波而行，攀爬峭壁。你的武侠梦，不再受束缚。

（我们的核心是创造一个‘无界’的武侠世界。在这里，地图没有空气墙，探索没有读条，整个世界是连贯、可交互、充满生机的）

2.  “第一代最受欢迎的玩法”：千种武学心法，自由搭配的武侠战斗
       没有僵化的“职业”限制！我们提供了超过数百种内功、外功、轻功、技艺。你可以是刀剑双绝的豪侠，也可以是精通音律、以琴音伤人的雅士，甚至是暗器毒术无双的“邪派”高手。
       武学招式不再是一成不变的关键循环。采用我们“无规则”战斗系统，所有的招式心苦自由搭配、组合，你自己的套路。是追求一击必杀的极限爆发，还是决定组建全场连绵不绝的控制？战斗的策略与乐趣，完全交由你。

3.  “你的江湖”：高自由度的人生，你的选择就是规则
       江湖不是非黑即白。你的每一个抉择都会引发难以想象的“因果链”。救下一个路人，他可能就是你未来宗门的引荐人；偷听一桩秘密，或许会让你卷入颠覆王朝的阴谋。
       可以选择拜入名门正派的恪守门规，也可以加入诡谲魔教随心所欲，更可以做个散人，逍遥自在。甚至可以完全抛开打杀，成为一名富甲天下的商贾、巧夺天工的匠人，也可以悬壶济世的神医。这个世界，认可你的每一种活法。

4.  “多达700万字的文本内容，庞大的玩法量级”：沙盒奇遇，要素隐藏线索
       《下一站江湖Ⅱ》的世界是“活”的。NPC们有自己的生活记录和喜怒哀乐。你可能在悬崖下发现前辈遗骸，学到失传绝学；也可能一碗酒，结交到一位隐世高人。
       大量未在任务列表中标记的“奇遇”事件散落在世界各个角落。探索的回报远超你的想象，真正的宝藏，永远献给最好奇的旅人。

5.  “市井百业，多维度沉浸身份”：技艺百态，感受江湖的烟火气
       江湖不止有武功。我们深入嵌入了当今同类生活技能：采矿、采药、锻造、制琴、象棋、书法、绘画、厨艺……这些不仅仅是赚钱的手段，更是提升角色、解锁特殊剧情和关卡能力的关键。一门技艺的技能，也能让你名动江湖。

【故事背景：游戏基础框架】（持续更新）
700万文字庞大世界观：战国末期，三国、百家、江湖！

1.  角色扮演：
① 多出身多结局，每个主角都是全新体验（当前已将门之子、富家千金、寒门书生、江湖浪子、无名小卒等五大身出300多万字主线剧情接近20个结局）

2.  市井身份：
① 皈依各器皿特色的城井身份独特的对应独立剧情、规则玩法。比如刺客对应青衣楼的门玩法派、以及相关的物品万字独立剧情，突出的悬赏及刺杀玩法等

3.  江湖霸图：模拟经营、骑砍LIKE、世界建造
① 物品可加入各具特色的门派
② 每个派都有自己的独立剧情以及与其他门派的恩怨，比如狂刀门和绝剑门的火烧凌云窟大型剧情
③ 每个门派都有自己突出的突出体系，以及规则：比如少林的从扫地僧至罗汉堂首座，敲钟玩法及铜人阵
④ 每个门派都强调自己的武学、心法体系
⑤ 每个门派都可以模拟经营、占领大世界的比如矿山青楼，并开启对应的经营
⑥ 每个门派都一样骑马与砍杀一样的世界争霸

4.  自由成长：习百家武学，走你自己的江湖

cn.trackName: LaxtTime - 日常记录/循环提醒/习惯养成/倒计时
cn.releaseNotes: - 优化年度统计视图的展示效果
cn.description:
LaxtTime是一款简单易用的记录软件，你可以使用它来记录生活中任何事情。

如果你生活中有一些重复出现的事情，那么LaxtTime会非常适合记录它们

#比如可以记录

上次打扫厨房的时间

上次冥想的时间

上次锻炼、喝水、购物的时间…

LaxtTime不仅精确记录每件事的上次发生时间，还能根据你设置的间隔自动提醒。

它是你可靠的记忆助手，让你无需费心记住琐事，专注于生活本身。

#特点

[记录上次发生时间]

LaxtTime会记录你每件事情的上次发生距今时间，精确到分钟。

如果你常常想不起来上次发生时间是什么时候，那么LaxtTime就是你可靠的助手，LaxtTime替你记住一切，你只需要尽情生活。

[重复提醒]

LaxtTime只有一个提醒功能，就是根据你设置的时间间隔来重复提醒，一旦你完成之后，就会重置提醒倒计时。

你也可以关闭提醒，只记录上次发生时间。

简单的设计，恰当的提醒。

[日程管理]

LaxtTime同时提供了简单易用的日历，帮助你管理日程。

[数据统计]

LaxtTime还有强大的数据统计功能，你可以按照周、月、年的维度来查看活动情况，包括打卡天数、打卡次数、平均间隔等信息。

同时LaxtTime还会帮你计算出平均打卡次数和打卡时间，帮助你发现生活中的规律。

[灵活的记录]

LaxtTime支持记录笔记、图片、选项、数值四种属性。

你可以创建若干个选项，例如选择[跑步]，[划船]，[游泳] …来记录你的每次锻炼。

你也可以记录每次跑步的距离，[3km], [4km] …

[简洁的UI]

LaxtTime拥有精心设计的明亮、暗黑主题配色，以及相当简洁的UI，快速获得你需要的信息。

[丰富的个性化]

LaxtTime提供了数十种预设颜色，你也可以进行自定义颜色来标记你的记录。

同时LaxtTime支持丰富的设置，可以个性化你的体验。

[实用的小组件]

支持小组件打卡，展示倒计时。

[热力图]

通过热力图来掌握你的活动规律。

[会员制说明]

会员可以解锁LaxtTime所有的付费功能，享受未来高级功能的免费更新。

# Introducing: Onyx Print
Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world.

# Produce Physical Photographs
Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending.

# Dynamic Prompting
Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx.
Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match.

# Use Your Own Photos
You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal.

# Works With Other Apps
Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it.
hk.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx: zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it sbeem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for revealing something ephemeral. Photograph a shadow, clouds, a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— Native clock swipe input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

# Introducing: Onyx Print
Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world.

# Produce Physical Photographs
Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending.

# Dynamic Prompting

Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match.

# Use Your Own Photos
You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal.

Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it.

Onyx Print is an in-app purchase within Onyx, and currently supports the Instax mini Link+, with plans for additional printers in the future.

Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits.

Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

hk.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

LaxtTime 是一個簡單易用的記錄應用程式，您可以用它來追蹤生活中的任何事情。

如果您的生活中有重複發生的事件，LaxtTime 是追蹤它們的完美工具。

上次清潔廚房的時間

上次冥想的時間

上次運動、喝水、去購物的時間...

LaxtTime 不僅準確記錄每個事件最後一次發生的時間，還會根據您設定的間隔自動提醒您。

它是您可靠的記憶助手，讓您可以專注於生活，無需擔心記住瑣碎的事情。

[記錄最後發生時間]

LaxtTime 記錄每個事件最後發生的時間，精確到分鐘。

如果您經常無法記住某事最後發生的時間，LaxtTime 就是您可靠的助手。LaxtTime 為您記住一切，您無需操心。

LaxtTime 只有一種提醒功能，即根據您設定的時間間隔重複提醒您。一旦您完成任務，提醒倒計時就會重置。

您也可以關閉提醒，只記錄最後發生時間。

設計簡單，提醒恰到好處。

LaxtTime 還提供簡單易用的日曆，幫助您管理日程。

您也可以記錄每次跑步的距離，[3公里]、[4公里]...

[簡潔界面]

LaxtTime 擁有精心設計的淺色和深色主題配色方案，以及非常簡潔的界面，讓您快速獲取所需信息。

[豐富個性化]

LaxtTime 提供數十種預設顏色，您還可以自定義顏色來標記您的記錄。

同時，LaxtTime 支持豐富的設置，讓您個性化使用體驗。

[實用小組件]

支持小組件打卡和倒計時顯示。

hk.releaseNotes:
The shadows over Hue County grow darker in the wake of a shocking murder.

Step into the elegant Noir Mansion and interrogate six suspects too sharp for their own good. They'll point fingers in every direction and offer up promises of honesty. 

But you know better. Trust nothing but your clue sheet...

Could it have been Crime Reporter Scarlett with the Mini Revolver? Maybe Private Detective Mustard used the "Civil War" Musket with Bayonet? Did Risk Analyst Plum turn himself into a liability with the Billiard Stick, or perhaps Lawyer Peacock cracked with the Meat Tenderiser. Did Signature Forger White sign off Boddy's death with the Silver Candelabra? Or maybe Con Artist Green phoned in a deadly performance with the Rotary Phone... 

With the Noir Mansion crime scene, you can toggle the special Noir filter at any time during your game! See the mansion in its full-colour glory, or drench it in deep, cinematic shadows. 

You'll also unlock Noir-themed cosmetics to dress up in true vintage style!

INCLUDES:
- A BRAND-NEW CRIME SCENE – The highly requested film-noir theme arrives in Clue/Cluedo!
- THEMED COSMETICS – This crime scene includes a new player avatar, a different card back, a themed clue sheet, a sleek dice set and 12 new tokens.
- MORE STORY TO EXPLORE – Delve into the murky backstories of each suspect and uncover their motives.
hk.description:
Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery.

Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. 

Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective.

In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! 

Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective!

HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 

1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime!
2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 
3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 
4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 
5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 
6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 
7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! 

FEATURES

- THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! 
- A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once.
- MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. 
- ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. 

Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

hk.description:
LumaFusion: 影片編輯的終極敘事體驗

歡迎體驗 App Store 2021「年度最佳 App」及「編輯精選獎」的得獎 App！我們是世界各地故事創作者的專業標準，提供流暢直觀、為觸控螢幕而設計的剪輯體驗。

【專業剪輯從此簡單又輕鬆】
• 6 條影音軌 / 圖像軌道：建立多層編輯，並平滑處理 4K ProRes 和 HDR 媒體。
• 另外 6 條音軌：建立聲景。
• 終極時間軸體驗：使用全球最靈活的軌道及磁性時間軸，實現流暢編輯。
• 大量過場效果：讓您的故事持續推進。
• 在外接顯示器上顯示預覽：在大螢幕上查看。
• 加入標記、標籤和備註：計畫案保持井井有條。
• 加入旁白：在播放您的電影的同時錄製旁白。

【圖層效果、色彩校正】
• 綠幕、亮度與色度去背：運用創意來建立圖層合成。
• Lock and Load 穩定器：保持鏡頭穩定。
• 強大的色彩校正：打造您自己的風格。
• 視頻波形、向量和直方圖範圍。
• LUT 色彩檔：匯入並套用多個 .cube 或 .3dl LUT 色彩檔。
• 關鍵影格無限數量：精準製作動畫效果。
• 自訂文字和效果預設值：儲存並分享你喜歡的動畫效果和外觀。
• 網格和參考線：精確對齊元素與標題安全區域、動作安全區域和水平線。

【進階音訊控制】
• 使用圖示型等化器、參數型等化器、聲音隔離功能：完美調整音訊細節。
• 關鍵影格音訊電平、聲像、等化器：進行完美混音。
• 支援立體聲和雙單聲道音訊：適用於在單一片段中使用多個麥克風的訪談。
• 使用自動迴避：在話語期間迴避音樂，保持音訊平衡。
• 第三方音訊擴充程式：增強聲音效果。

【創意標題字幕、多層文字】
• 建立多層標題字幕：將圖形、圖像和文字加入您的圖形中。
• 自行調整字體、顏色、填充顏色、邊框和陰影：設計出引人注目的標題字幕。
• 匯入自訂字體：增強您的品牌。
• 儲存並分享標題字幕預設值：非常適合協作。

【計畫案彈性管理、媒體素材庫】
• 涵蓋所有不同需求的長寬比：包括寬銀幕電影、社群媒體影片或更多其他需求。
• 影格率範圍為 18fps-240fps：可靈活應用於任何工作流程。
• 直接編輯來自 USB-C 硬碟、「照片」App 和 Frame.io 的媒體項目：讓你隨時隨地存取媒體內容。
• 從雲端匯入媒體：自選儲存空間，沒有限制。

【分享剪輯成果】
• 控制解析度、畫質和格式：
• 將電影分享至社交媒體、本地儲存或雲端儲存。
• 跨裝置剪輯：輕鬆無縫傳輸計畫案。

增強功能（可單獨購買，或作為創作者通行證訂閱的一部分獲取所有功能 - 請參見下文）
• 速度調節與增強關鍵幀 - 使用這個獨一無二且易於使用的功能，創建速度調節、貝茲曲線和緩動效果。
• XML 匯出：將你的計畫案匯出到 Mac 上的 Final Cut Pro
• Multicam Studio「多機工作室」：同步 6 個攝影機或音訊，點一下即可切換角度

創作者通行證訂閱
• 享用 Storyblocks for LumaFusion：數百萬首高品質免版稅音樂、音效和視頻，還可獲得上述所有增強功能。

【免費優質支援服務】
• 線上教學：www.youtube.com/@LumaTouch

# Introducing: Onyx Print
Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world.

# Produce Physical Photographs
Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending.

# Dynamic Prompting
Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx.
Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match.

# Use Your Own Photos
You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal.

# Works With Other Apps
Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it.
mo.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx: zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it sbeem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for revealing something ephemeral. Photograph a shadow, clouds, a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— Native clock swipe input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

mo.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

mo.description:
LaxtTime 是一個簡單易用的記錄應用程式，您可以用它來追蹤生活中的任何事情。

如果您的生活中有重複發生的事件，LaxtTime 是追蹤它們的完美工具。

#例如，您可以記錄

上次清潔廚房的時間

上次冥想的時間

上次運動、喝水、去購物的時間...

LaxtTime 不僅準確記錄每個事件最後一次發生的時間，還會根據您設定的間隔自動提醒您。

它是您可靠的記憶助手，讓您可以專注於生活，無需擔心記住瑣碎的事情。

#功能

[記錄最後發生時間]

LaxtTime 記錄每個事件最後發生的時間，精確到分鐘。

如果您經常無法記住某事最後發生的時間，LaxtTime 就是您可靠的助手。LaxtTime 為您記住一切，您無需操心。

[重複提醒]

LaxtTime 只有一種提醒功能，即根據您設定的時間間隔重複提醒您。一旦您完成任務，提醒倒計時就會重置。

您也可以關閉提醒，只記錄最後發生時間。

設計簡單，提醒恰到好處。

[日程管理]

LaxtTime 還提供簡單易用的日曆，幫助您管理日程。

[數據統計]

LaxtTime 還具有強大的數據統計功能。您可以按週、月、年查看活動狀態，包括打卡天數、打卡次數、平均間隔等信息。

同時，LaxtTime 會幫您計算平均打卡次數和打卡時間，幫助您發現生活中的規律。

[靈活記錄]

LaxtTime 支持記錄四種屬性：筆記、圖片、選項和數值。

您可以創建多個選項，例如選擇[跑步]、[划船]、[游泳]...來記錄每次鍛煉。

您也可以記錄每次跑步的距離，[3公里]、[4公里]...

[簡潔界面]

LaxtTime 擁有精心設計的淺色和深色主題配色方案，以及非常簡潔的界面，讓您快速獲取所需信息。

[豐富個性化]

LaxtTime 提供數十種預設顏色，您還可以自定義顏色來標記您的記錄。

同時，LaxtTime 支持豐富的設置，讓您個性化使用體驗。

[實用小組件]

支持小組件打卡和倒計時顯示。

[熱力圖]

使用熱力圖了解您的活動模式。

[會員說明]
會員可以解鎖 LaxtTime 的所有付費功能，並享受未來高級功能的免費更新。

mo.description:
LumaFusion: 影片編輯的終極敘事體驗

歡迎體驗 App Store 2021「年度最佳 App」及「編輯精選獎」的得獎 App！我們是世界各地故事創作者的專業標準，提供流暢直觀、為觸控螢幕而設計的剪輯體驗。

【專業剪輯從此簡單又輕鬆】
• 6 條影音軌 / 圖像軌道：建立多層編輯，並平滑處理 4K ProRes 和 HDR 媒體。
• 另外 6 條音軌：建立聲景。
• 終極時間軸體驗：使用全球最靈活的軌道及磁性時間軸，實現流暢編輯。
• 大量過場效果：讓您的故事持續推進。
• 在外接顯示器上顯示預覽：在大螢幕上查看。
• 加入標記、標籤和備註：計畫案保持井井有條。
• 加入旁白：在播放您的電影的同時錄製旁白。

【圖層效果、色彩校正】
• 綠幕、亮度與色度去背：運用創意來建立圖層合成。
• Lock and Load 穩定器：保持鏡頭穩定。
• 強大的色彩校正：打造您自己的風格。
• 視頻波形、向量和直方圖範圍。
• LUT 色彩檔：匯入並套用多個 .cube 或 .3dl LUT 色彩檔。
• 關鍵影格無限數量：精準製作動畫效果。
• 自訂文字和效果預設值：儲存並分享你喜歡的動畫效果和外觀。
• 網格和參考線：精確對齊元素與標題安全區域、動作安全區域和水平線。

【進階音訊控制】
• 使用圖示型等化器、參數型等化器、聲音隔離功能：完美調整音訊細節。
• 關鍵影格音訊電平、聲像、等化器：進行完美混音。
• 支援立體聲和雙單聲道音訊：適用於在單一片段中使用多個麥克風的訪談。
• 使用自動迴避：在話語期間迴避音樂，保持音訊平衡。
• 第三方音訊擴充程式：增強聲音效果。

【創意標題字幕、多層文字】
• 建立多層標題字幕：將圖形、圖像和文字加入您的圖形中。
• 自行調整字體、顏色、填充顏色、邊框和陰影：設計出引人注目的標題字幕。
• 匯入自訂字體：增強您的品牌。
• 儲存並分享標題字幕預設值：非常適合協作。

【計畫案彈性管理、媒體素材庫】
• 涵蓋所有不同需求的長寬比：包括寬銀幕電影、社群媒體影片或更多其他需求。
• 影格率範圍為 18fps-240fps：可靈活應用於任何工作流程。
• 直接編輯來自 USB-C 硬碟、「照片」App 和 Frame.io 的媒體項目：讓你隨時隨地存取媒體內容。
• 從雲端匯入媒體：自選儲存空間，沒有限制。

【分享剪輯成果】
• 控制解析度、畫質和格式：
• 將電影分享至社交媒體、本地儲存或雲端儲存。
• 跨裝置剪輯：輕鬆無縫傳輸計畫案。

增強功能（可單獨購買，或作為創作者通行證訂閱的一部分獲取所有功能 - 請參見下文）
• 速度調節與增強關鍵幀 - 使用這個獨一無二且易於使用的功能，創建速度調節、貝茲曲線和緩動效果。
• XML 匯出：將你的計畫案匯出到 Mac 上的 Final Cut Pro
• Multicam Studio「多機工作室」：同步 6 個攝影機或音訊，點一下即可切換角度

創作者通行證訂閱
• 享用 Storyblocks for LumaFusion：數百萬首高品質免版稅音樂、音效和視頻，還可獲得上述所有增強功能。

【免費優質支援服務】
• 線上教學：www.youtube.com/@LumaTouch
• 參考指南：luma-touch.com/lumafusion-reference-guide
• 支援：luma-touch.com/support

# Introducing: Onyx Print
Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world.

# Produce Physical Photographs
Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending.

# Dynamic Prompting
Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx.
Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match.

# Use Your Own Photos
You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal.

# Works With Other Apps
Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it.
tw.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx: zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it sbeem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for revealing something ephemeral. Photograph a shadow, clouds, a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— Native clock swipe input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

Onyx Print is an in-app purchase within Onyx, and currently supports the Instax mini Link+, with plans for additional printers in the future.

Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits.

Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

tw.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

Using cutting edge AI, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx: zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it sbeem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for revealing something ephemeral. Photograph a shadow, clouds, a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— Native clock swipe input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

# Introducing: Onyx Print
Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world.

# Produce Physical Photographs
Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending.

# Dynamic Prompting
Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx.
Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match.

# Use Your Own Photos
You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal.

# Works With Other Apps
Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it.

Onyx Print is an in-app purchase within Onyx, and currently supports the Instax mini Link+, with plans for additional printers in the future.

Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits.

Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

us.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

us.description:
LaxtTime is a simple and easy-to-use recording app that you can use to track anything in your life.
 
If you have recurring events in your life, LaxtTime is perfect for keeping track of them.

#For example, you can record

The last time you cleaned the kitchen

The last time you meditated

The last time you exercised, drank water, went shopping...

LaxtTime not only accurately records the last occurrence of each event but also automatically reminds you based on intervals you set.

It's your reliable memory assistant, allowing you to focus on living without worrying about remembering trivial matters.

#Features

[Record Last Occurrence]

LaxtTime records the time since each event last occurred, accurate to the minute.

If you often can't remember when something last happened, LaxtTime is your reliable assistant. LaxtTime remembers everything for you, so you don’t have to.

[Repeat Reminders]

LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets.

You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time.

Simple design, appropriate reminders.

[Schedule Management]

LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule.

[Data Statistics]

LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information.

At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life.

[Flexible Recording]

LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values.

You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts.

You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]...

[Clean UI]

LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need.

[Rich Personalization]

LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records.

At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience.

[Practical Widgets]

Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays.

[Heat Map]

Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns.

[Membership Instructions]
Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features.

us.description:
Roundguard is a bouncy dungeon crawler with pinball physics, lots of loot, and a randomized castle full of oddballs. Highly-rated former Apple Arcade game and Mobile Game of the Year nominee!

If you love roguelikes & Peggle, then Roundguard is for you. Press your luck against hordes of dangerously cute monsters and challenging roguelike elements in this all-round bouncy adventure!

Bouncy Fun: Intuitive pinball physics-based gameplay like no other dungeon crawler.

Multiple Classes: Play as the Warrior, the Rogue, the Wizard, or the Druid, each with their own unique skills, items, and cheeky sense of humor.

Show Off Your Skills: Compete on the leaderboards and try to master all the challenging, rule-bending relics. Earn all the Encore roses in an escalating series of difficulty ranks for each hero.

Daily Puzzles: A new short puzzle every day to test your skills. 

Weekly Runs: New special rules each week. Compete against the world on dedicated weekly leaderboards.

Randomized Dungeon: Each time you play, levels are procedurally generated, and quest events and elite monsters are randomly placed.

Permadeath with Benefits: When you die, you’ll have a chance to bring a special trinket with you on your next run. The more gold you grab, the better your chances to collect one of the most powerful trinkets.

A Cast of Oddballs: Chat with the castle’s colorful cast to pick up quests and learn why some rats want their king dead, what’s irritating the local teenage skeleton today, or what the Warrior will do if you can’t get to a bathroom quickly enough.

Lots of Loot: Over 200 items and trinkets, each with effects that present strategic choices and combo possibilities.

Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

us.description:
RadarScope is an AMS-award-winning weather visualization tool that empowers meteorologists, public safety officials, storm spotters, and weather enthusiasts to view a full suite of single-site radar data and related severe weather products. Your initial purchase provides professional radar visualization in a fully native app, free from distracting and invasive practices, with optional subscription packages to add even more capabilities.

Whether you’re scanning for a mesocyclone’s tell-tale hook echo, pinpointing the landfall of a hurricane’s eye wall, or identifying velocity couplet, hail spike, or debris ball signatures, RadarScope displays native radar data in its original radial format. You see what the radar sees almost as soon as the radar sees it, with automatic updates every two to ten minutes depending on the radar’s scanning strategy.

Your initial app purchase includes the following:

• Full suite of single-site radar products for the US, Canada, Guam, Denmark, Finland, and Germany
• 6-frame radar loops
• Two built-in providers for radar data
• Tornado, thunderstorm, flash flood, marine, snow squall, extreme wind, tropical, and other warnings in the US
• Selected severe weather warnings in Canada and Australia
• NWS-generated storm tracks with hail, TVS, and mesocyclone attributes
• Inspector and distance tools
• Color palette options for radar data
• AllisonHouse data plan integration
• Spotter Network integration for storm and location reporting
• mPING integration for submitting weather reports to NSSL
• Bundled maps with political boundaries, water bodies, and major highways, optimized for low-bandwidth use
• Support for widgets and complications
• Universal app for Apple platforms, including Apple Watch and Apple TV
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier One is an optional annual subscription that adds more features for tracking severe weather:

• 30-frame radar loops
• Cloud-to-ground lightning strikes
• Severe weather watches in the US and Canada
• Special weather statements in the US and Canada
• Mesoscale convective and precipitation discussions
• SPC convective, tornado, hail, wind, and fire outlooks
• WPC excessive rainfall outlooks in the US
• Local storm reports in the US
• Custom color palette support
• Multi-pane display (2 on phones; 4 on larger devices)
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier Two is an optional annual or monthly subscription that transforms RadarScope into a more complete visualization tool for a larger suite of weather products, including:

• Everything in Pro Tier One
• 50-frame radar loops
• A third provider for US radar data
• NEXRAD Level II radar data for the US with a 30-year historical archive
• Historical NEXRAD Level III, super-res, and non-US radar data with a 30-day archive
• Historical NWS bulletins with a 19-year archive
• GOES East and GOES West satellite products
• NSSL’s Multi-Radar Multi-Sensor (MRMS) products
• NCEP’s Real-Time Mesoscale Assimilation (RTMA) products
• Surface observations
• Atmospheric soundings in the US
• Hail size, hail probability, and azimuthal shear contours with a 30-day archive
• More detailed transportation and satellite imagery maps
• Custom color palette support for GOES, MRMS, and RTMA
• Server-sent events for radar and warning updates
• Cross-platform subscription sharing on up to 5 devices
• Family sharing support

If you choose to buy a RadarScope Pro subscription, it will be charged to your App Store account. The subscription will be auto-renewed within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the same price you originally paid. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal disabled via your App Store account settings after the purchase. Once purchased, the subscription cannot be canceled during the active subscription period.

"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

tr.description:
LaxtTime is a simple and easy-to-use recording app that you can use to track anything in your life.
 
If you have recurring events in your life, LaxtTime is perfect for keeping track of them.

#For example, you can record

The last time you cleaned the kitchen

The last time you meditated

The last time you exercised, drank water, went shopping...

LaxtTime not only accurately records the last occurrence of each event but also automatically reminds you based on intervals you set.

It's your reliable memory assistant, allowing you to focus on living without worrying about remembering trivial matters.

#Features

[Record Last Occurrence]

LaxtTime records the time since each event last occurred, accurate to the minute.

If you often can't remember when something last happened, LaxtTime is your reliable assistant. LaxtTime remembers everything for you, so you don’t have to.

[Repeat Reminders]

LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets.

You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time.

Simple design, appropriate reminders.

[Schedule Management]

LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule.

[Data Statistics]

LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information.

At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life.

[Flexible Recording]

LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values.

You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts.

You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]...

[Clean UI]

LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need.

[Rich Personalization]

LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records.

At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience.

[Practical Widgets]

Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays.

[Heat Map]

Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns.

[Membership Instructions]
Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features.

# Introducing: Onyx Print
Onyx Print brings Onyx’s digital effect into the real world.

# Produce Physical Photographs
Instead of revealing information only on a screen, Onyx Print can generate and automatically print images on a pocket printer, allowing you to produce a real photograph from your wallet, pocket, or envelope for a powerful ending.

# Dynamic Prompting
Onyx Print uses the same dynamic prompting and covert input system that powers Onyx.
Use any of Onyx’s input methods, and Onyx Print will automatically generate and print an image to match.

# Use Your Own Photos
You can even modify existing photos. For example: have Onyx Print set up with a photo of yourself and have a spectator name any place in the world. Onyx Print will then create and automatically print a realistic photo of you in that exact location, ready to reveal.

# Works With Other Apps
Onyx Print can even monitor your photo library and automatically print images saved by other apps. When an app saves a photo, Onyx Print can print it.
pt.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.

Em "This War of Mine" você não irá jogar com um soldado de elite, mas sim com um grupo de civis tentando sobreviver em uma cidade sitiada, lutando contra a falta de alimentos, medicamentos e constante perigo de franco-atiradores e catadores hostis. O jogo oferece uma experiência de guerra vista de um ângulo inteiramente novo.

O andamento do jogo "This War of Mine" se dá pelos ciclos, dia e noite. Durante o dia franco-atiradores irá impedi-lo de sair de seu abrigo, então seu objetivo será: manter seu abrigo seguro, construir melhorias, negociar com catadores e/ou vizinhos e cuidar de seus sobreviventes. À noite, você selecionará um de seus civis para ir coletar suprimentos nos locais indicados no mapa, esses itens coletados irão ajudar você e seu grupo a permanecerem vivos.

Tome decisões de vida ou morte seguindo a sua consciência. Tente proteger todos de seu abrigo, ou então, se necessário, sacrifique alguém para a sobrevivência da maioria. Durante a guerra, não há nenhuma decisão boa ou ruim. Somente a vontade de sobreviver. Quanto mais cedo você entender isso, melhor.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
Dois anos já se passaram desde o lançamento global de This War of Mine, e ainda estamos expandindo a experiência do jogo. Este novo DLC grátis, criado especialmente para a Edição de Aniversário, adiciona novos personagens, novos locais para explorar e, o mais importante: um final inédito, que leva a uma nova conclusão do jogo. No entanto, o dilema continua o mesmo: o quão longe você iria para proteger seus entes queridos?

LaxtTime has only one reminder function, which is to remind you repeatedly based on the time interval you set. Once you complete the task, the reminder countdown resets.

You can also turn off reminders and only record the last occurrence time.

Simple design, appropriate reminders.

[Schedule Management]

LaxtTime also provides a simple and easy-to-use calendar to help you manage your schedule.

[Data Statistics]

LaxtTime also has powerful data statistics functions. You can view activity status by week, month, and year, including check-in days, check-in times, average intervals, and other information.

At the same time, LaxtTime will help you calculate the average number of check-ins and check-in times, helping you discover patterns in your life.

[Flexible Recording]

LaxtTime supports recording four types of attributes: notes, pictures, options, and values.

You can create several options, such as choosing [Running], [Rowing], [Swimming]... to record each of your workouts.

You can also record the distance of each run, [3km], [4km]...

[Clean UI]

LaxtTime features carefully designed light and dark theme color schemes, as well as a very clean UI, allowing you to quickly obtain the information you need.

[Rich Personalization]

LaxtTime offers dozens of preset colors, and you can also customize colors to mark your records.

At the same time, LaxtTime supports a wealth of settings to personalize your experience.

[Practical Widgets]

Supports widget check-ins and countdown displays.

[Heat Map]

Use heat maps to understand your activity patterns.

[Membership Instructions]
Members can unlock all paid features of LaxtTime and enjoy free updates for future advanced features.

pt.releaseNotes:
DEATH REASON
Uncover the reason for your death in this chilling new feature. Explore various dark and mysterious causes behind your inevitable fate, adding a layer of depth and narrative to your Countdown experience. What will your fate be? Discover the truth behind your demise with each new countdown.

NOTIFICATIONS
Ozhin may now tease you with notifications, randomly changing the course of your fate. The tension is never predictable. At any moment, Ozhin could alter your countdown, adding new twists to your fate or delivering unnerving clues about what’s to come. Stay alert, as Ozhin is always watching and can change the outcome when you least expect it.
pt.description:
O teu conto regressivo aguarda. Inspirada no filme de terror Countdown, esta app revelará exatamente quanto tempo te resta.

Ao receber, abrir o pacote de ficheiros e/ou usar o Countdown ("Software") que contém este software, concordas que este Contrato de Licença de Utilizador Final (EULA) é um contrato legalmente vinculativo e válido e concordas em cumprir com ele. Concordas em obedecer às leis de propriedade intelectual e a todos os termos e condições deste Acordo. O utilizador aceita os termos do seu próprio destino. Qualquer tentativa de usar informações derivadas do Countdown para alterar o destino do utilizador resultará numa violação deste contrato.

EXPERIÊNCIA EM CASA
Descobre a presença de Ozhin em tua casa e prepara-te para um encontro arrepiante, enquanto eventos sobrenaturais ganham vida. Esta funcionalidade utiliza o HomeKit para interagir com os teus dispositivos domésticos e oferecer uma experiência imersiva de terror. Ozhin fará a sua presença ser sentida através de flashes rápidos e aleatórios de luzes, criando uma atmosfera inquietante que aumentará a tensão. Esta funcionalidade está disponível apenas para utilizadores com acessórios HomeKit.

Aviso importante:
Esta experiência inclui luzes a piscar que podem não ser adequadas para pessoas com epilepsia ou para aqueles sensíveis a padrões intensos de luz. Se tens epilepsia, és propenso a convulsões ou tens sensibilidade a luzes intermitentes, toma precauções ou evita utilizar esta funcionalidade para evitar potenciais riscos.

CHAT AO VIVO
Conecta-te com outros utilizadores em tempo real e vive os contagens regressivas juntos. Vê enquanto o contador de cada pessoa avança. Esta funcionalidade social permite que converses e discutas os eventos da app enquanto vives o terror em conjunto.

NOVO: MOTIVO DA MORTE
Descobre o motivo da tua morte nesta nova e arrepiante funcionalidade. Explora várias causas obscuras e misteriosas por trás do teu destino inevitável, adicionando uma nova camada de profundidade e narrativa à tua experiência com o Countdown. Qual será o teu destino? Descobre a verdade por trás da tua morte a cada novo contador.

NOVO: NOTIFICAÇÕES
Ozhin agora pode provocar-te com notificações, alterando aleatoriamente o curso do teu destino. A tensão nunca é previsível. A qualquer momento, Ozhin pode alterar o teu contador, adicionar novos reviravoltas ao teu destino ou enviar pistas perturbadoras sobre o que está por vir. Fica alerta, pois Ozhin está sempre a observar e pode mudar o resultado quando menos esperares.

Subscrições
A app Countdown oferece tanto uma oferta vitalícia como uma subscrição mensal para desbloquear todas as funcionalidades premium, intensificar os sustos e remover as interrupções. Estas subscrições garantem que recebas a experiência mais intensa e imersiva do Countdown.

Termos da Subscrição:

Oferta Vitalícia: Pagamento único para acesso completo a todas as funcionalidades atuais e futuras do Countdown 2.0, incluindo todo o conteúdo premium, sustos aumentados e remoção de anúncios.

Subscrição Mensal: Pagamento recorrente para desbloquear todas as funcionalidades e benefícios do Countdown 2.0, com renovação mensal.

Isenção de Responsabilidade:
Esta app é para fins de entretenimento. Os resultados não devem ser levados a sério. A experiência foi projetada para aumentar a suspense e oferecer sustos emocionantes. Certifica-te de que estás confortável com o conteúdo antes de utilizar, especialmente as luzes e sons intermitentes, que têm como objetivo criar uma sensação de terror crescente.

pt.description:
LumaFusion: a melhor experiência narrativa para edição de vídeos

Welcome to the App Store’s “App of the Year” for 2021 and the recipient of the Editors’ Choice Award! The gold standard for storytellers worldwide. Offering a fluid, intuitive, touch-screen editing experience.

EDIÇÃO PROFISSIONAL FACILITADA
• Seis faixas de vídeo/áudio ou gráficos: crie edições de múltiplas camadas com manuseio fácil de mídia 4K ProRes e HDR.
• Seis faixas de áudio adicionais: construa seu ambiente sonoro.
• A linha do tempo ideal: edição fluente usando a linha do tempo magnética e guiada mais flexível do mundo.
• Muitas transições: mantenha sua história em movimento.
• Prévia no monitor externo: veja em uma tela grande.
• Marcadores, tags e notas: mantenha-se organizado.
• Locução: grave VO enquanto reproduz seu filme.

EFEITOS EM CAMADAS E CORREÇÃO DE COR
• Tela verde, luma e chroma key: para a composição criativa.
• Prepare o estabilizador de vídeo: mantenha sua filmagem estável.
• Correção de cores poderosa: crie o seu próprio visual.
• Formas de onda de vídeo, escopo vetorial e histograma.
• LUTs: Importe e aplique múltiplas LUTs .cube ou .3dl.
• Quadros-chave ilimitados: anime efeitos com precisão.
• Presets de textos e efeitos personalizáveis: salve e compartilhe suas animações e visuais favoritos.
• Grades e guias: alinhe elementos com título seguro, ação segura e linha de horizonte.

CONTROLE DE ÁUDIO AVANÇADO
• Equalizador gráfico, equalizador paramétrico e isolamento de voz: sintonize o áudio.
• Níveis de áudio de quadro-chave, panorâmica e equalizador: crie mixagens perfeitas.
• Suporte para áudio estéreo e mono duplo: para entrevistas com vários microfones em um clipe.
Redução de áudio: equilibre sua música e diálogo.
• Plug-ins de áudio externos: aprimore seu som.

TÍTULOS CRIATIVOS E TEXTO MULTICAMADAS
• Títulos multicamadas: combine formas, imagens e textos em seu gráfico.
• Fontes, cores, bordas e sombras personalizáveis: crie títulos atrativos.
• Importe fontes personalizadas: fortaleça sua marca.
• Salve e compartilhe presets de títulos: perfeito para colaboração.

FLEXIBILIDADE DE PROJETOS E BIBLIOTECA DE MÍDIA
• Proporções para todos os usos: do cinema panorâmico às redes sociais.
• Taxas de quadros de 18 fps a 240 fps: flexibilidade para qualquer cenário.
• Edite a partir das Fotos, Frame.io e diretamente de unidades USB-C: acesse seu conteúdo em qualquer lugar.
• Importe mídias do armazenamento na nuvem: onde quer que você as armazene.

COMPARTILHE SUAS OBRAS-PRIMAS
• Controle resolução, qualidade e formato:
• Compartilhar filmes em redes sociais, armazenamento local ou armazenamento em nuvem.
• Edite em vários dispositivos: transfira projetos com facilidade.

RECURSOS AVANÇADOS (compre individualmente ou obtenha TODOS como parte da assinatura do Creator Pass - veja abaixo)
• Aceleração de Velocidade e Keyframing Aprimorado - Crie rampas de velocidade, curvas de Bézier e easing com este recurso único e fácil de usar.
• Exportação XML: Exporte seu projeto para o Final Cut Pro para Mac
• Multicam Studio: sincronize 6 câmeras ou áudio e toque para alternar ângulos

ASSINATURA CREATOR PASS
• Obtenha acesso total ao Storyblocks para LumaFusion: milhões de músicas, efeitos sonoros e vídeos isentos de direitos autorais de alta qualidade, além de obter todos os recursos aprimorados acima.

SUPORTE GRATUITO EXTRAORDINÁRIO
• Tutoriais on-line: www.youtube.com/@LumaTouch
• Guia de referência: luma-touch.com/lumafusion-reference-guide
• Suporte: luma-touch.com/support

pt.description:
Roundguard é um jogo de exploração de masmorras com quicadas e física de pinball, com um montão de saques e um castelo um castelo cheio de coisas esquisitas. Teste a sua sorte contra hordas de monstros perigosamente lindos e elementos desafiadores estilo rogue nesta aventura cheia de reviravoltas!

Se você adora jogos de masmorra e Peggle, então Roundguard é o seu jogo!

Diversão com rebatidas: Jogabilidade intuitiva com base em pinball como nenhum outro jogo de masmorra.

Classes múltiplas: Jogue como o Guerreiro, a Trapaceira ou a Maga, cada um com habilidades, itens e um senso de humor únicos.

Masmorra aleatória: Toda vez que você joga, níveis são gerados por procedimentos e eventos de missões e monstros de elite são colocados aleatoriamente.

Permamorte com benefícios: Ao morrer, você tem a chance de trazer uma bugiganga especial com você na próxima jogada. Quanto mais ouro você pegar, melhores serão suas chances de coletar uma das bugigangas mais poderosas.

Uma variedade de coisas esquisitas: Converse com o variado pessoal do castelo para receber missões e descobrir por que alguns ratos querem seu rei morto, o que está irritando o esqueleto adolescente local e o que o Guerreiro faria se não conseguisse chegar no banheiro a tempo.

Muito saque: Mais de 100 itens e bugigangas, cada um com efeitos que apresentam escolhas estratégicas e possibilidades de combo.

Mostre suas habilidades: Compita nas tabelas de classificação e tente dominar todas as relíquias desafiadoras e que dobram as regras.
